description: Rise of Avalon Patch 7 - Hotfix 1 (21 October 2020) — Fixes.

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Resolved an issue where Crafting Stations do not regenerate their Crafting Capacity
UI still displays incorrectly; changing zones updates the value temporarily
Update (22.10): Fixed for Windows / Mac / Linux; mobile fix pending
Resolved an issue where some trap templates in Corrupted Dungeons were double layered, causing extra lasers and lava traps
sections.searchable_text: Fixes Crafting Stations Crafting Capacity UI bug Corrupted Dungeons traps double layered lasers lava
